name: Precision Camshafts Limited
summary: Precision Camshafts Limited manufactures and sells parts of motor vehicle for original equipment manufacturers in India, Asia, China, Europe, and internationally. It offers chilled cast iron, ductile iron, hybrid, and assembled camshafts for the automotive industry; fuel injector components for conventional and DRDi diesel engines; stainless steel components for instrumentation and equipment; prismatic components, such as powertrain, brakes, and chassis components; and balancer shafts and assemblies, as well as electric trucks and buses, and drivelines. The company provides approximately 150 varieties of camshafts for passenger vehicles. The company was founded in 1992 and is based in Solapur, India.
